instructions.text: Identify evidence scope — determine which artifact type(s) are appropriate for the task
Capture screenshots using playwright-mcp with page.screenshot() saving to .context/evidence/
Capture screenshots using agent-browser screenshot action saving to .context/evidence/
Capture logs by piping to tee and saving to .context/evidence/ as .txt files
Capture script output by redirecting stdout/stderr to .context/evidence/
Append evidence summary table to task response with artifact path and description
Never describe observations without saving an artifact — prose is not verifiable
Never use vague slugs like screenshot1.png — use descriptive kebab-case names
Never skip evidence capture when the task involves external state (UI, logs, infrastructure)
Store all artifacts under .context/evidence/ with date-prefixed filenames
Verify artifacts were written by checking ls -lh .context/evidence/
